subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, beyond human stations and ranks of utterance, befitteth the Lord of Divine Purpose, Who through the breezes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از مقامات انسان و مراتب لسان حضرت مقصودیرا لایق و سزاست که از نفحات
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
